title: relay store: get_all_key_packages no LIMIT — unbounded BLOB scan per user
description: store::get_all_key_packages() (relay/src/store.rs:499) issues SELECT with no LIMIT over key_packages for a pub_id. Called from ws.rs GET_KEY_PACKAGE untargeted path (no device_id supplied). A malicious client can call PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE repeatedly (limited only by rate_limit_per_min, which resets every 60 s) to accumulate key packages, then any peer calling GET_KEY_PACKAGE (untargeted) triggers a full BLOB scan returning all packages. At 8 KiB per package and 60 publishes/minute sustained over time, the response can be large. Fix: add LIMIT (e.g. 32) to get_all_key_packages and cap per-user key packages in save_key_package.
notes: Part of security review round 23 (epic nie-nvk2)
